_comment: Shared FEAT-011 declaration vectors — asserted by BOTH suites so the backend (HeaderNameDerivation/Declarations/ParameterKind, DeclarationVectorsTest) and the frontend presentation mirror (frontend/src/lib/headerDerivation.ts, headerDerivation.test.ts) can never drift. Header rule: split on spaces, hyphens, and underscores; strip everything but ASCII letters/digits per segment; drop empty segments; uppercase each segment's first character, keep the rest as typed; join with '-'.

reservedHeaderNames._comment: Case-insensitive, both header locations — Accept/Content-Type owned by content negotiation, Authorization by the future security feature.

oneOf._comment: Values are trimmed, then: at least one, non-blank, distinct (case-sensitively — values are payload, not names). 'enum' is the canonical value list after normalization.

invalid.why: values must be distinct after trimming
